suppliers.primex: Lab testing — per-test cost from Primex pricing sheet
suppliers.pyxis: Peptides, GLP-1, NAD+ — per-vial cost from Pyxis catalog
suppliers.anazao: AnazaoHealth FDA 503B — NAD+ IV, Vit C, Glutathione, HRT (all prices include $2 CA surcharge)
suppliers.merit: Merit Pharmaceutical — pharmaceutical-grade injectables and IV supplies (B12, MgSO4, UV tubing, hardware)
suppliers.ald: Advanced Light Devices, LLC — Las Vegas NV. Actual supplier for compounded Methylene Blue IV (Gene@aldmed.com)
suppliers.ald_anazao: Dual-source — MB from Advanced Light Devices, VitC from AnazaoHealth
suppliers.estimated: No invoice yet — estimated value, verify before relying on margin calc
suppliers.depreciation_model: HBOT/RLT — equipment depreciation + consumables per session

notes.lab_cogs: Confirmed from Primex lab pricing sheet (RANGE MEDICAL Lab Prices.pdf). Costs = sum of individual test charges.
notes.nad_cogs: Confirmed from Pyxis: NAD 1000mg = $77/vial (includes 10% markup). Per-session cost = (mg_used / 1000) * $77 + $10 bag/consumables.
notes.vitc_cogs: Confirmed from McGuff Invoice 1074504-IN: Ascor® 500mg/mL 50mL PBP vial = $30.00 ($1.20/g). 25g=1 vial, 50g=2 vials, 75g=3 vials. Add $2.34/vial for SwanLock dispensing pin. Previously sourced from AnazaoHealth at $2.93/g — McGuff is 59% cheaper.
notes.peptide_cogs: Confirmed from Pyxis vial costs. Per-protocol cost = vials_needed * vial_price. Phase durations estimated — verify against actual protocol sheets.
notes.glp1_cogs: Confirmed from Pyxis. Tirzepatide 40mg = $220/vial (10% markup applied). Retatrutide 20mg = $154/vial (10% markup applied). Monthly cost calculated from standard titration dosing — verify against actual dose schedules.
notes.semaglutide_cogs: Semaglutide NOT in Pyxis catalog — source and cost TBD.
notes.hbot_rlt_cogs: Modeled as depreciation + O2 + consumables. Update with actual equipment cost and session capacity.
notes.pyxis_unlisted_services: Pyxis catalog includes products not yet in services.json: IGF-LR3 ($45), TA1/$55, AOD9604 ($45), BPC standalone 5mg ($20), Selank ($30), SS31 ($70), DSIP ($20), Follistatin ($80), HGH 100iu ($150), Epithalon ($45). Consider adding to menu.

costs.notes: CMP ($7.00) + CBC ($4.00) + G6PD (~$7 est). G6PD is a Primex send-out test — not in their standard catalog. Confirm cost directly with Primex rep.

costs.name: [REF] Male Post Panel (8977)
costs.notes: CMP, CBC, Estradiol, PSA, Total/Free Testosterone. Used for HRT follow-up.

costs.name: [REF] Female Post Panel (8979)
costs.notes: CMP, CBC, Estradiol, Free/Total Testosterone. Used for HRT follow-up.

costs.name: Range IV

cogs_breakdown.iv_hardware_note: 500mL NS bag ($4.20) + catheter ($2.735) + IV set ($2.785) + draw needle ($0.088) + misc ($0.52)

costs.confirmed_from: Two IV infusion notes (Damien + Nurse Lily, March 2026). B12 sourced from AnazaoHealth price list June 2025.
costs.notes: All ingredient costs fully confirmed from invoices. B-Complex dose varies 2–3mL per nurse; $37.53 uses 2.5mL avg. Range: $35.40 (2mL) – $39.67 (3mL).

costs.name: Immune Defense IV
costs.dose_assumptions: VitC 15g (30mL) — most uncertain item. Could be 10g ($12) or 25g ($32.34+pin). Glutathione assumed 400mg (2×). Confirm all doses.
costs.notes: No B12 vs Range IV (saves $9.57). Adds extra VitC + higher Glutathione. COGS range: ~$38 (10g VitC) to ~$59 (25g VitC) → margin range 74%–83% at $225.

costs.name: Energy & Vitality IV
costs.dose_assumptions: L-Carnitine assumed 2g (4mL at 500mg/mL). Could be 1g (2mL=$7) or 3g (6mL=$21). B12 same dose as Range IV. Confirm L-Carnitine dose.
costs.notes: Most expensive of the four specialty IVs due to L-Carnitine. COGS range: ~$43 (1g L-Carnitine) to ~$57 (3g) → margin range 74%–81% at $225.

costs.name: Muscle Recovery & Performance IV
costs.dose_assumptions: AminoMultiPlex assumed 5mL. Could be 10mL ($16.17) for higher amino dose. No B12 (saves $9.57 vs Range IV). Confirm AminoMultiPlex dose.
costs.notes: Best margin of the four at 83.3%. COGS range: ~$38 (5mL amino) to ~$46 (10mL) → stays above 80% either way at $225.

costs.name: Detox & Cellular Repair IV
costs.dose_assumptions: VitC assumed 10g (20mL). NAC assumed 600mg (3mL). Glutathione assumed 600mg (3mL, higher for detox). No B12, no B-Complex. Confirm all doses.
costs.notes: NAC is the most expensive component per mL ($3.567). VitC dose is the biggest variable: $2 (1g) to $32 (25g). COGS range: ~$32–$54 → margin stays above 76% at $225.

costs.name: IV Add-on (Single Nutrient)
costs.notes: Website: 'Add on any additional nutrient for $35 each.' COGS varies by ingredient: extra VitC 5g=$3, B-Complex 1mL=$4.13, Glutathione 200mg=$1.57, L-Carnitine 1g=$7, NAC 200mg=$3.57. $8 is a mid-range estimate.

costs.name: Vitamin C 25g
costs.mcguff_product: Ascor® Ascorbic Acid Injection USP 500mg/mL 50mL PBP

costs.name: Methylene Blue IV

cogs_breakdown.mb_drug_source: Advanced Light Devices LLC — Sterile 10mL 0.2um Filtered MB, $85/vial + $1.66 shipping
cogs_breakdown.iv_hardware_note: UV-protective tubing (UV004) required for MB — prevents photodegradation

costs.notes: Dose CONFIRMED at 5mg per session. Vial cost CONFIRMED from ALD Invoice #4443. Concentration assumed 10mg/mL (1% standard compounded MB) — if different, recalculate: cost_per_session = $86.66 / (vial_total_mg / 5).

costs.name: MB + Vit C + Mag Combo

cogs_breakdown.vitc_calc: 25g / 15g per vial × $43.99 (AnazaoHealth 30mL MDV) — VitC dose UNCONFIRMED
cogs_breakdown.mag_calc: ~1g MgSO4 assumed / 5g per vial × $6.50 (Merit MgSO4 50%) — Mag dose UNCONFIRMED

costs.notes: MB cost now confirmed (5mg, ALD source). VitC dose and Mag dose still unconfirmed — using 25g VitC and 1g Mag as placeholders. Confirm recipe with provider.

costs.name: Standard Injection

cogs_breakdown.estimate_basis: Mid-range estimate pending B12/MIC price confirmation

costs.notes: Olympia products via THS confirmed on shelf (B-Complex $124/30mL, D3 $101/30mL, L-Carnitine $105/30mL). Methylcobalamin B12 and MIC prices still unknown — not in any THS invoice. Dose per injection unconfirmed. Range: $3.79 (D3) to $8.69 (B-Complex).

costs.name: Premium Injection

cogs_breakdown.estimate_basis: L-Carnitine shot mid-estimate; higher if glutathione or MIC included

costs.notes: L-Carnitine confirmed at $105/30mL (Olympia via THS). MIC price unknown — not in any invoice. If premium = L-Carnitine only: $7.42. If L-Carnitine + MIC: ~$12-15. If Glutathione push: $16.09. Clarify what 'Premium Injection' maps to in Stripe transactions.

costs.name: GHK-Cu Cream
costs.notes: Topical cream formulation — different product from injectable GHK vial. Confirm compounding cost with supplier.

costs.name: GLOW — 30-Day
costs.notes: Composition confirmed: GHK-Cu 50mg + BPC-157 10mg + TB-500 10mg. Vial price $55 confirmed by Chris (includes 10%). 30-day once-daily = 1 vial exactly.

costs.name: MOTS-C Phase 1
costs.notes: Drug cost identical either way (2 vials = 20mg). COGS uses conservative 30-day hardware ($91.00). 20-day variant is $85.08 — $5.92 difference at $400 sell price.

costs.name: MOTS-C Phase 2
costs.notes: Drug cost identical either way (4 vials = 40mg). COGS uses conservative 30-day hardware ($174.60). 20-day variant is $168.68 — $5.92 difference at $700 sell price.

costs.name: DSIP — 10mg Vial (Take-Home)
